title: ANY.RUN Feed
description:
ANY.RUN's Threat Intelligence Feeds (TI Feeds) is a continuously updated source of fresh network-based Indicators of Compromise (IOCs): IPs, domains, and URLs. The IOCs are extracted from real-time analyses done by experts from 15,000 companies in ANY.RUN's Interactive Sandbox.

This connector provides OpenCTI users with automated access to uniquely sourced and accurate indicators of compromise.

Key benefits:

- Expanded Coverage: Exclusive IOCs from Memory Dumps, Suricata IDS, in-browser data, and internal threat categorization systems
- Reduced Workload: Pre-processed indicators with minimum false positives, ready for analysis or investigation
- Informed Response: Rich metadata providing context for in-depth threat investigations and faster response
short_description: ANY.RUN Feed connector imports fresh network-based IOCs (IPs, domains, URLs) extracted from real-time sandbox analyses, with rich metadata and minimal false positives.
